## Statistical contract

## Validation

- [ ] Fast unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Numerical/simulation test added when applicable
- [ ] Invalid input and edge cases tested
- [ ] Optional integration remains isolated
- [ ] `devtools::document()`, `devtools::test()`, and `devtools::check()` pass
- [ ] User-facing changes recorded in NEWS

## Data and privacy

<!-- Confirm that fixtures are redistributable and no secrets or private data are included. -->

- [ ] I have the right to contribute every added or modified component under

- [ ] Derived material is identified, attributed, and accompanied by its
      original copyright and license notices
- [ ] Added data or fixtures are original, generated, or documented as
      redistributable
